1. First ordered item
  2. Second ordered item
    • Unordered sub-item A
    • Unordered sub-item B
      • Deeply nested unordered item
    • Unordered sub-item C
  3. Third ordered item
    • Another unordered sub-list
    • With a second entry
  4. Fourth ordered item
    • Sub-item
      1. Ordered sub-sub-item
      2. Another ordered sub-sub-item
